detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英語聽力與會話(一) (English Listening and Speaking I)	開課班級 : 應英一年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 陳宛利	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
a) Experience stages of listening: receiving, understanding, remembering, evaluating, giving feedback b) Understand vocabulary in context c) Cultivate the ability to accurately receive and interpret received messages d) Evaluate arguments and make inferences e) Develop analytical and critical thinking skills 


2.教學綱要
This course aims at helping students enhance listening comprehension in relation to other aspects of academic literacies through in-class discussion and oral presentation. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Reflect: Listening & Speaking 4　
出版日期 : 2022年 月 
作者 : Paul Dummett　出版社 : 　版本 :  


4.參考書
9	書名 : Fresh Off the Boat 菜鳥新移民 (film)　出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Eddie Huang 黃頤銘　出版社 : 2015 年 2 月 4 日~ 2020 年 2 月 21 日　版本 :  

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Assessment: Punctuality and attendance, in-class group discussion and presentation, Quiz (40%); Midterm Exam (30%); Final Exam (30%) 
Course Requirements: Students are expected to attend all class sessions and come prepared with the required course materials. Late arrival, failure to bring course materials, or engaging in distractions such as phone use (“phubbing”) will result in deductions from the final grade. Each group discussion counts toward your participation grade; active engagement is essential. Punctuality is mandatory. Students may be called on at random to answer questions and will be graded based on how well they demonstrate understanding of the assigned readings. There are no make-up quizzes for absences. It is your responsibility to understand the course requirements and manage your performance accordingly. 
To facilitate learning outside the classroom, course materials and assignments will be uploaded onto E-campus, an E-learning environment for all NQU courses. All students must resister for E-campus and also enter a frequently used email account in order to gain full access to course materials, to receive course updates, to form small groups, and to submit homework online. In an early prevention of an unexpected internet breakdown, please be advised to download weekly reading materials in advance. For course-related questions, contact me at tmpmlily@gmail.com * 詳盡之授課規劃將於第一週上課公告及說明，並依照實際上課狀況與(遠距)教學形式作適度調整，請同學至Ecampus平台，課程內輸入Email信箱，以接收即時課程資訊。 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG10 減少不平等


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
